Manufacturing Guide

Custom Clothing Manufacturer in Pakistan: The Complete Brand Owner's Guide

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 12 min read
Home / Blog / Custom Clothing Manufacturer in Pakistan: The Complete Brand Owner's Guide

Pakistan is a top 5 global textile exporter, and within its borders, the city of Sialkot stands as the undisputed capital of custom clothing manufacturing. For brand owners in the USA, UK, Canada, and Australia searching for a custom clothing manufacturer in Pakistan, understanding why this region dominates the industry can save thousands of dollars and months of development time.

At FABRIOZA, we operate an ISO 9001 certified facility in the heart of Sialkot's manufacturing cluster, delivering factory-direct custom apparel with minimum orders starting at just 50 pieces. This guide explains everything you need to know about manufacturing in Pakistan — and why FABRIOZA should be your first choice.

Why Pakistan Is the Right Choice for Custom Clothing in 2026

Pakistan ranks among the world's top 5 textile exporters, with the industry contributing over 60% of the country's total exports. The Sialkot district, located in Punjab province, has built a 70+ year legacy in export manufacturing — starting with sports goods and evolving into one of the world's most sophisticated apparel production hubs.

What makes Sialkot uniquely positioned for custom clothing manufacturing?

  • Private international airport: Sialkot is one of the few manufacturing cities in Asia with its own international airport, enabling direct air freight connections to major markets.
  • Fabric mills within 50km: The entire supply chain — from raw fabric to finished garment — exists within a 50-kilometer radius, reducing lead times and costs.
  • Export processing zones: Designated zones offer tax incentives, streamlined customs procedures, and dedicated logistics infrastructure.
  • ISO 9001 certified factories at 50-unit MOQs: Unlike China or Bangladesh where certified factories typically require 300-500 unit minimums, Sialkot's cluster accepts orders as low as 50 pieces.

For brand owners launching or scaling their collections, this combination of quality certification, low minimums, and vertical integration is unmatched anywhere in the world.

What FABRIOZA Manufactures — Complete Product Range

FABRIOZA manufactures a comprehensive range of custom clothing categories, each with full customization options:

Product Categories

  • Custom Sportswear: Moisture-wicking jerseys, training tops, performance shorts, and athletic sets
  • Custom Hoodies: From 280 GSM lightweight to 400 GSM ultra-heavyweight, French terry and brushed fleece
  • Team Uniforms: Soccer, basketball, cricket, rugby, and esports kits with full sublimation
  • Streetwear: Oversized hoodies, heavyweight tees, jogger sets, and cargo pants
  • Sublimation Apparel: All-over print jerseys, cycling kits, and compression wear
  • Private Label Apparel: Fully branded garments with woven labels, hangtags, and custom packaging
  • Cut and Sew: Fully custom patterns from your tech pack or design reference

Customization Techniques

  • Embroidery: 3D puff, flat, and tackle twill — durable and premium
  • Screen Printing: Up to 8 colors with soft-hand and discharge options
  • Sublimation: Unlimited colors, all-over designs on polyester fabrics
  • Heat Transfer: Ideal for detailed logos and small-run applications
  • Puff Print: Raised, textured prints for bold streetwear branding
  • Custom Labels: Woven neck labels, printed care labels, hangtags, polybag branding

FABRIOZA's Step-by-Step Manufacturing Process

Our process is designed to take brands from concept to finished product with complete transparency at every stage:

  1. Send Inquiry → Receive Quote in 24 Hours: Share your product type, quantity, design references, or tech pack. Our team responds within 24 hours with detailed pricing.
  2. Sample Development (7-10 Days): We produce a physical sample based on your specifications — fabric, fit, color, and all customizations.
  3. Sample Approval and Revision: You review the sample. Up to 2 revision rounds are included to perfect the garment.
  4. Bulk Production (3-5 Weeks): Once the sample is approved, we begin full production with photo updates at key milestones.
  5. ISO 9001 Quality Control Inspection: Every garment passes our 4-stage QC process before packing.
  6. Shipping and Worldwide Delivery: We handle all export documentation. Choose air freight (5-7 days) or sea freight (25-35 days) with DDP delivery.

Minimum Order Quantities — Starting From 50 Pieces

Our 50-piece minimum order quantity is made possible by Sialkot's integrated supply chain. Because fabric mills, trim suppliers, and production facilities are located within the same industrial cluster, we can purchase materials in smaller quantities without the surcharges typical of factories that import materials from distant regions.

LocationTypical MOQDDP Available?ISO 9001?
FABRIOZA (Pakistan)50 pcsYesYes
China large factory300-1,000 pcsRarelyVariable
Bangladesh500-2,000 pcsNoLimited at low MOQ
Turkey200-500 pcsSometimesVariable

ISO 9001 Certification — What It Means for Your Order

ISO 9001 is an internationally recognized quality management system standard. For FABRIOZA, this certification means:

  • Independently audited processes: Our manufacturing, quality control, and documentation procedures are verified by a third-party certification body annually.
  • Consistent production quality: Whether you order 50 pieces or 5,000 pieces, the same documented processes apply.
  • Traceability: Every production batch is documented and traceable, ensuring accountability.
  • Continuous improvement: ISO 9001 requires regular review and improvement of processes — meaning our quality gets better over time.

Worldwide Shipping From Sialkot, Pakistan

FABRIOZA ships to over 30 countries worldwide. Our logistics team handles all export documentation, customs clearance, and delivery coordination.

  • Air Freight: 5-7 days worldwide — ideal for samples and urgent orders
  • Sea Freight to USA: 25-35 days — most economical for bulk orders
  • Sea Freight to UK/Europe: 22-28 days — competitive transit times
  • DDP (Delivered Duty Paid): Available on request — we handle customs duties and last-mile delivery

How to Get Your Free Quote From FABRIOZA

Getting a quote takes less than 5 minutes. Include the following in your inquiry:

  • Product type: Hoodie, t-shirt, tracksuit, jersey, etc.
  • Quantity: Starting from 50 pieces per style
  • Design reference: Tech pack, sketch, photo, or Pinterest board
  • Target price range: So we can recommend the right materials and techniques

Send your inquiry to info@fabrioza.com or use our contact form. Our team responds within 24 hours with detailed pricing and production timelines.

Ready to Start Your Custom Clothing Order?

Contact FABRIOZA and get a detailed quote within 24 hours. ISO 9001 certified. Low MOQ from 50 pieces. Worldwide shipping.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum order quantity at FABRIOZA?

Our minimum order quantity is 50 pieces per style. This applies across all product categories including hoodies, t-shirts, sportswear, and team uniforms. You can mix sizes within the 50-piece minimum.

How long does manufacturing take from inquiry to delivery?

Total timeline is typically 6-8 weeks: 24 hours for quote, 7-10 days for sample, 1-2 weeks for sample revisions, 3-5 weeks for bulk production, and 5-35 days for shipping depending on method.

Does FABRIOZA offer private label services with custom branding?

Yes. Every private label order includes custom woven neck labels, printed care labels (compliant with USA/UK/EU/AU regulations), branded hangtags, and custom polybag packaging. All branding is produced in-house.

Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?

Absolutely. We require sample approval before beginning bulk production. Sample cost is typically $50-150 depending on complexity and is credited against your first bulk order.

Which countries does FABRIOZA ship to?

We ship worldwide to over 30 countries including the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Germany, France, UAE, and throughout Europe. DDP shipping is available to most destinations.
